title: PlayCanvas | Open Source WebGL & WebGPU Game Engine
data: How I turned a photogrammetric 3D Gaussian Splat scene into a playable browser FPS - with collision, pre-baked lighting, navmesh-driven NPCs... Last month we shipped Walk Mode, Streamed LOD and Easy Upload — three huge upgrades for exploring and publishing splats. Today we're rolling... Last month we launched SuperSplat Studio, giving creators the power to add annotations and cinematic post effects to their published splats....
